# RPG Carpentry & Joinery

> Professional carpentry and joinery services across Devon and Cornwall, UK.

## About
RPG Carpentry & Joinery is a Cornwall-based carpentry and joinery specialist with over 10 years of experience. We provide residential and commercial carpentry services across Devon and Cornwall, including bespoke doors, windows, oak flooring, barn renovations, fencing, canopies, stairs, and custom joinery. We have completed over 200 projects and pride ourselves on quality craftsmanship using traditional techniques combined with modern methods.

## Services
- Doors & Frames: Bespoke door fitting and framing for all styles of property (£150-£400 fitted)
- Windows: Window installation and replacement (£300-£800)
- Oak Flooring: Supply and fitting of solid and engineered oak flooring (£45-£90 per m² installed)
- Barn Renovations: Restoration and conversion of barns and outbuildings (£800-£1,500 per m²)
- Canopies & Pergolas: Handcrafted outdoor covered structures
- Fencing: Timber fencing for residential and commercial boundaries (£80-£120 per panel)
- Skirting & Boxing: Skirting boards, architraves, and pipe boxing
- Flat Roofing: Flat roof carpentry and decking
- Stairs: Bespoke staircase construction and renovation (£2,000-£8,000)
- Bespoke Joinery: Custom furniture, wine racks, shelving, and made-to-measure pieces

## Service Areas
- Plymouth and surrounding areas (Barbican, Plympton, Saltash, South Hams)
- Exeter and surrounding areas (Topsham, Crediton, Exmouth)
- Torquay and the English Riviera (Paignton, Brixham, Newton Abbot)
- Barnstaple and North Devon (Bideford, Ilfracombe, South Molton)
- Truro and central Cornwall (Falmouth, Penryn, Redruth, St Austell)
- Tavistock and West Devon (Okehampton, Launceston, Yelverton)

## Frequently Asked Questions
- How much does carpentry cost? Day rates typically £200-£350, project-based pricing for larger work. Free no-obligation quotes provided.
- What areas do you cover? All of Devon and Cornwall including Plymouth, Exeter, Torquay, Barnstaple, Truro, Tavistock and surrounding towns.
- How long does a typical project take? Small jobs 1-3 days, medium projects 1-2 weeks, barn renovations 2-6 months.
- Do you provide free quotes? Yes, we visit the property and provide a detailed quote within 48 hours.
- Do I need planning permission for a barn conversion? Most barn conversions require planning permission. Class Q permitted development may apply for agricultural-to-residential conversions.
